text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 115 

INGRDNT_CST_BILLED_AMT 

LABEL: Ingredient Cost Billed Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This field identifies the charge to cover the cost of ingredients for the prescription or drug. 

SHORT NAME: INGRDNT_CST_BILLED_AMT 

LONG NAME: INGRDNT_CST_BILLED_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line file 

VALUES: Dollar amount with two decimal places
